story_arceus_09_05000/2401_1001_0100_10: I’m so happy to see you again!
story_arceus_09_05000/2401_1001_0200_10:
When we battled Serena at the Tower of
Mastery back in Kalos...
story_arceus_09_05000/2401_1001_0300_10: you chose to accompany her on her journey.
story_arceus_09_05000/2401_1001_0400_10:
Thanks for entrusting me with Lucario back
then, Korrina!
story_arceus_09_05000/2401_1001_0500_10:
My adventure with Lucario became precious
to me.
story_arceus_09_05000/2401_1001_0700_10:
Well then. I want to see how strong you
and Lucario have become.
story_arceus_09_05000/2401_1001_1000_10:
I’ve always wanted us and our Lucario to
battle again!
story_arceus_09_05000/2401_1001_1100_10: I’m sure they feel the same!
story_arceus_09_05000/2401_1001_1300_10: Let’s give it all we’ve got!
story_arceus_09_05000/2401_1001_1400_10: Don’t hold back—just like last time!
story_arceus_09_05000/2401_1001_1500_10:
With our bond’s strength, I’ll master
Mega Evolution!
story_arceus_09_05000/2401_1001_1700_10:
Back in Kalos, I sent Serena off to the
successor...
story_arceus_09_05000/2401_1001_1800_10:
and she had a battle like this on the 
Tower of Mastery?!
story_arceus_09_05000/2401_1001_1900_10:
I can tell your bond as a sync pair
has grown.
story_arceus_09_05000/2401_1001_2000_10:
It’s far stronger than the last time
we battled!
story_arceus_09_05000/2401_1001_2100_10:
Of course! Lucario and I overcame so much
together!
story_arceus_09_05000/2401_1001_2200_10: You’re tough, just as I expected.
story_arceus_09_05000/2401_1001_2300_10: But our bond is just as strong!
story_arceus_09_05000/2401_1001_2700_10: A ritual to decide your fate and future.
story_arceus_09_05000/2401_1001_2800_10:
Light gained on your path shows the way
you’re meant to go.
story_arceus_09_05000/2401_1001_3300_10: Is this... Is this an arc suit?
story_arceus_09_05000/2401_1001_3400_10:
We did it, Lucario! We awakened our
arc suit!
story_arceus_09_05000/2401_1001_3500_10: That means Arceus recognized their bond!
story_arceus_09_05000/2401_1001_3700_10: But we won’t give up until the end!
story_arceus_09_05000/2401_1001_3800_10: I’ll give you everything I’ve got!
